purpose: Post-launch marketing check-in schedule for new website (blackhilllandscaping.com)

checkins.name: Smoke Test (Day 2-3)
checkins.focus: Verify nothing broke — ads serving, conversion tracking, GBP status, 301 redirects, WhatConverts
checkins.action: Run smoke test, fix any broken items

checkins.name: 2-Week Review
checkins.focus: First directional data — CTR trend, conversion rate direction, GBP name change settled
checkins.action: Pull data, compare trends, flag problems

checkins.name: 30-Day Comparison
checkins.focus: Full month comparison — CPA, conversions, lead volume, GBP engagement
checkins.action: Generate full comparison report (docx), measure CPA improvement

checkins.name: 90-Day Final Baseline
checkins.focus: True long-term impact — algorithm adjusted, Quality Scores recalculated, GBP settled
checkins.action: Generate final comparison report (docx), measure total ROI of website investment
